data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_MayGettingReady: POKéMON fully restored!\nItems ready, and... Huh?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_MayWhoAreYou:
Huh?
Who... Who are you?\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pOh, you're {PLAYER}{KUN}.
So your move was today.\pUm... I'm MAY.
Glad to meet you!\pI...
I have this dream of becoming friends\lwith POKéMON all over the world.\pI... I heard about you, {PLAYER}{KUN}, from
my dad, PROF. BIRCH.\pI was hoping that you would be nice,
{PLAYER}{KUN}, and that we could be friends.\pOh, this is silly, isn't it?
I... I've just met you, {PLAYER}{KUN}.\pEheheh...\pOh, no! I forgot!\pI was supposed to go help Dad catch
some wild POKéMON!\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, I'll catch you later!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_BrendanGettingReady: POKéMON fully restored...\nItems all packed, and...
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_BrendanWhoAreYou:
Hey!
You...\pWho are you?\pOh, you're {PLAYER}, aren't you?
Moved in next door, right?\pI didn't know that you're a girl.\pDad, PROF. BIRCH, said that our new
next-door neighbor is a GYM LEADER's\lkid, so I assumed you'd be a guy.\pMy name's BRENDAN.
So, hi, neighbor!\pHuh? Hey, {PLAYER}, don't you have
a POKéMON?\pDo you want me to go catch you one?\pAw, darn, I forgot...\pI'm supposed to go help my dad catch
some wild POKéMON.\pSome other time, okay?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_MayJustCheckingMyPok:
MAY: {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pI was just checking my POKéDEX.\pThere's still a lot of POKéMON that
I've seen but haven't caught.\pAnd there are many others that
I think will evolve.\pI wonder where I should go catch
some POKéMON next?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_MayWhereShouldIGoNex: MAY: I wonder where I should go catch\nsome POKéMON next?\pWouldn't it be funny if we ran into each\nother, {PLAYER}{KUN}?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_BrendanJustCheckingM: BRENDAN: Hey, it's {PLAYER}.\pI was just checking out my POKéDEX.\pThere are still many POKéMON that\nI need to catch, I know, but this\lis looking pretty good.\pChecking this POKéDEX out gives me\nthe urge to hit the road again.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_BrendanWhereShouldIG: BRENDAN: I'm having a hard time deciding\nwhere I should catch POKéMON next.\pHey, {PLAYER}, if I see you while I'm out\ncatching POKéMON, I can pitch you a\lbattle if you'd like.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.UnknownString_8173A76: It's lined with POKéMON picture books.
